brief: Lindsey Graham's death reshapes U.S. politics and Iran policy, while a T. rex fossil sells for $50.1 million and ICE pauses traffic stops after shootings. Research highlights AI's role in creative writing, climate communication, and workplace email.
news_summary: Lindsey Graham's death leaves his Russia sanctions bill uncertain; his sister Darline Graham was sworn in to fill his Senate term. The U.S. resumes strikes on Iran and blocks its ports, while ICE pauses vehicle stops after two fatal shootings. A T. rex fossil sold for $50.1 million, and NYC Council backs a ban on horse-drawn carriages.
papers_summary: Papers explore AI in collaborative creative writing (FIERO), personal narratives on climate change via TikTok, and how AI-assisted email tone affects recipient engagement. Other work includes visual analytics for crypto manipulation risk and a taxonomy of data narrative failures.

en.brief: Lindsey Graham's death reshapes U.S. politics and Iran policy, while a T. rex fossil sells for $50.1 million and ICE pauses traffic stops after shootings. Research highlights AI's role in creative writing, climate communication, and workplace email.
en.news_summary: Lindsey Graham's death leaves his Russia sanctions bill uncertain; his sister Darline Graham was sworn in to fill his Senate term. The U.S. resumes strikes on Iran and blocks its ports, while ICE pauses vehicle stops after two fatal shootings. A T. rex fossil sold for $50.1 million, and NYC Council backs a ban on horse-drawn carriages.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore AI in collaborative creative writing (FIERO), personal narratives on climate change via TikTok, and how AI-assisted email tone affects recipient engagement. Other work includes visual analytics for crypto manipulation risk and a taxonomy of data narrative failures.

zh.brief: 今日重磅：中国异见人士董广平驾艇偷渡韩国；南海仲裁案十年争议未消；政治局委员马兴瑞被双开。霸王龙化石以5010万美元成交创纪录。研究论文关注AI协作写作与气候变化叙事。
zh.news_summary: 中国异见人士董广平第四次偷渡韩国引关注；南海仲裁案十周年争议持续；马兴瑞被开除党籍公职；6700万年霸王龙化石拍出5010万美元天价。
zh.papers_summary: 英文研究论文聚焦AI在创意写作、邮件沟通及气候变化短视频中的角色，以及加密货币操纵风险可视化等话题。

todays_image.caption: Just as the T. rex faced extinction from a shifting environment, Lindsey Graham must choose a political path as his party's landscape changes.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
